title: trachelospermum asiaticum var. majus
intro: Trachelospermum asiaticum var. majus, also known as Asian evergreen Clematis or Asiatic jasmine, is a type of flowering vine native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Trachelospermum asiaticum var. majus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
